phase2_builder_implementation.notes: Phase 2 implemented: D1 (AgentSession metadata — pipeline/stage/role), D2 (signal handling with inotify + exchange loop via openclaw agent --session-id), D3 (STAGE_FLOW table + stall detection), D4 (reviewer_joined event on second agent attach), D5 (cockpit FLAG-1 fix — register.json direct read), D6 (graceful degradation — existing patterns sufficient), D7 (session archival to markdown). FLAG-1 resolved: openclaw agent --session-id already supports deterministic session routing. FLAG-2 deferred to V5 (compaction trigger). Total ~225 lines across 3 files. Commit 14a81b0c.
